Generate a structured knowledge source describing an application's communication
patterns, authentication, IPC channels, stealth features, telemetry, and security
posture from any supported file type (APK, ASAR, PE, ELF, etc.).

Examples:
  unravel knowledge ./app.apk
  unravel knowledge ./app.asar --json
  unravel knowledge ./binary.exe -o ./report -v

Usage:
  unravel knowledge <path> [flags]
  unravel knowledge [command]

Available Commands:
  ask             Free-form Q&A over the knowledge base — expansion + multi-search + synthesis
  backfill-static Populate module_deps and clean noisy symbols_json from stored bodies (pure-Go, no AI)
  diff            Compare two knowledge directories
  dissect-app     Seed app_facts from the YAML registry (and run mechanical dissect steps)
  doctor          Audit knowledge.db integrity — orphans, embedding dims, fact_history precision
  dump            Print one module row (full body excerpt, summary, tags)
  enrich          Run claude as a pipeline to translate modules into structured natural-language analysis
  extract         Extract JS bundles from a Chromium Block File Cache directory
  facts           Show answered facts in a readable layout
  fill            Loop until no gaps remain — claude answers each open fact
  gaps            List app_facts rows whose value is NULL (open questions)
  index           Index extracted JS bundles into a Postgres + pg_trgm knowledge base
  ingest          Walk a source-code repo and persist modules into the knowledge DB
  list-apps       Print the built-in app cache registry used by 'sweep'
  mcp-loop        Drive the gap-resolution loop without an MCP client (debug)
  migrate         Generate cross-framework migration hints. Token cost applies.
  pending         List modules whose summary is empty (id<TAB>app<TAB>name)
  prompts         Inspect the embedded LLM prompt registry
  repos           List repos indexed by 'knowledge ingest'
  search          Search knowledge base modules using trigram fuzzy match
  sources         Print the knowledge_sources evolution timeline
  stats           Per-app row counts, summarized counts, average body size
  summarize       Persist a natural-language summary against a module id
  sweep           Auto-extract + auto-index every supported app's cache into one knowledge DB
  synth-names     Derive deterministic synthetic_name for teams_module_<N> placeholder modules (pure-Go, no AI)
  topics          Derive deterministic modules.topic over the enriched subset (pure-Go, no AI)

Flags:
      --cdp-port int             CDP port for runtime probe (0 = no probe)
      --enrich                   enrich dependency list with CVE/CWE/version-freshness data (sends dep names to OSV/NVD/GHSA — opt-in per D-08)
      --enrich-include-private   do NOT skip scoped/private packages during enrichment (overrides D-08 default)
  -h, --help                     help for knowledge
      --iterate                  Run iterative-deepening rubric loop (P57)
      --json                     Output as JSON to stdout
      --live                     Enable optional live-overlay capture pass (CDP). Adds provenance metadata; static output unchanged when absent.
      --live-timeout duration    Maximum live-pass duration. Default 30s. (default 30s)
      --max-iter int             Maximum iterations for --iterate (default 5)
      --scorecard-md             Emit SCORECARD.md next to knowledge.json (default true)
      --strict-citations         Require every spec line to cite evidence (P58) (default true)
      --threshold int            Score threshold (percent) for convergence (default 80)
      --with-ai                  Enable MCP-backed beautification across Java/JS/Bundle/C# tracks. Token cost applies.

Global Flags:
      --debug              dump all intermediate artifacts to a timestamped debug/ directory
  -o, --output string      output directory
      --tools-dir string   directory with RE tools to prepend to PATH
  -v, --verbose            verbose output

Use "unravel knowledge [command] --help" for more information about a command.
